caption: A person's computer screen displays a web browser with multiple open tabs and a video conferencing interface. A large, dark-themed digital map or network diagram occupies the center of the screen, featuring several nodes and connecting lines. One prominent node contains a portrait of a bald man with glasses, connected by a blue line to another node and a green line to a node showing a person in a white shirt. A small video feed in the top center shows a man wearing a blue shirt and a dark cap. The browser's address bar contains the text "blackboard.uul.ac.uk/learning". At the top, several tabs are visible, including ones titled "Truth & Learning by Sypniewski", "Failure of Society by Sypniewski", and "Rural Community Food Spirit". The visual content remains static across the sequence, with no discernible changes in the images, text, or layout.
